title: tripogon coreensis
intro: Tripogon coreensis, also known as Coreopsis or Tickseed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Tripogon coreensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Tripogon coreensis are typically made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's extracts in capsules or tinctures.
